verificationReason: Existing Shepherd alignment and targeted Phase 0 gates pass; dependent hardening phases and full verification remain.

orchestrationDecisions.reason: Create the isolated parent branch, durable plan, draft parent PR, and child issue contracts before mutating workers start.
Three read-only subagents inspect baseline architecture, characterization tests, and control-plane design without sharing mutation authority.
Draft parent PR #324 and fifteen native child issues #325-#339 were created before the first mutating worker dispatch.
Issue #325 was assigned to an isolated Codex worker; all other implementation issues remain dependency-blocked.
Normally merge feat/pi-shepherd-loop, guard the real Shepherd entrypoint, and update only its validator model before any further controller work.

Assigned issue #326 test stabilization to its existing isolated worktree; reconciled the next serial chain as #339 -> #342 -> #343 -> #327 and corrected #339 to adopt the canonical shell CONTROL.json contract rather than the excluded controller experiment.
